title: asplenium rhizophorum var. rutaceum
intro: Asplenium rhizophorum var. rutaceum, also known as the 'Rutaceum' or 'Ruta-leaved Asplenium', is a variety of the Asplenium rhizophorum fern, characterized by its unique leaf morphology. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, derived from its chemical composition of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Consuming Asplenium rhizophorum var. rutaceum has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and providing antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
